# Reproducible Proteomics Report

The final output of the system is a reproducible report.

## Report Sections

A practical proteomics interpretation report may include:

```text
study objective
sample metadata
comparison design
data inputs
quality control
differential abundance summary
top proteins
GO enrichment
pathway enrichment
STRING network analysis
biological interpretation
limitations
next steps
```

## Report Outputs

```text
HTML report
tables
figures
reusable input lists
analysis log
```
